name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the chocolate wafers into fine crumbs.
2. Combine the crumbs with melted butter, sugar, and nutmeg in a bowl.
3. Press the mixture evenly over the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan, up to 1/2 inch from the top.
4. Refrigerate until set.
5. In another bowl, beat the eggs and sugar until light and fluffy.
6. Add the softened cream cheese, melted chocolate, vanilla extract, salt, and sour cream to the egg mixture. Beat until smooth.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared crust.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until the cheesecake is just firm when gently jiggled.
9. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
10. Refrigerate, covered, overnight.
11. If desired, top with whipped cream before serving.
